name: Hover Border Gradient
summary: A button component with rotating radial gradient border that cycles through sides when not hovered.
detailedDescription: Hover Border Gradient creates a button with animated border highlight using radial gradients. The component cycles through four border positions (TOP, LEFT, BOTTOM, RIGHT) every second when not hovered, creating rotating highlight effect. Each position uses specific radial-gradient: TOP/BOTTOM use 20.7% height at 50% center, LEFT/RIGHT use 16.6% width at 50% edge. On hover, cycling stops and gradient locks to hover position. Inner button has black background (dark: white) with white text, rounded-full corners, and p-px border container. The outer container uses bg-black/20 (dark: white/20) with hover:bg-black/10 transition. Duration prop controls rotation speed (default 1s), clockwise prop reverses direction. This creates eye-catching border animation ideal for CTAs, navigation buttons, or any context where animated border draws attention without overwhelming content.
purpose: Draw attention with moving border effect
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
